deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature at mobile notary. Closed Apr 27, 2026.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket + rug + trolley to Joy. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Thank you basket to Michael (notary) + UPS Store staff. Personal thank you to Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded
Cleared and funded
Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Delivered to Chicago Title.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo regarding lien holder

deals.title: Tilden 20ac - Steven Jimenez
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. First offer (Michael Rodriguez) dead - no earnest money. Clearing complete. New prospect interested in subdividing. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve as clearing wraps. When next offer comes, lead with net after close, not gross price. Keep Lauren in the loop as TC.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Commission box correction still needed.
Steve sent new photos. Prospect interested in subdividing reached out.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social media. Drone footage next priority.
Current offer dead. Steve more open to overall picture on offers.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751 - Priority Bank REO
deals.notes: Bank foreclosure needs work before listing. Cleanup active - floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utility setup in progress (Medina Electric + EMCSUD). Listing agreement needed for Priority Bank.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site. Submit Medina Electric application. Confirm water setup with EMCSUD. Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler + Ray Stidham. Get updated payoff information.

logs.m: Cleanup active. Floor demo complete. Drywall cut. Email sent to Kelly with utility info.
On-site visit. Met Bryce (dumpster contractor). NEW LEAD: Bryce's wife active military VA buyer.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters.
Two estimates received. HouzzPro ($54,877) vs T&T Construction ($61,980) compared.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr - Matt Gamez & Chandler Grulli
deals.notes: Underwater by $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K. Market value $350K-$400K. Double-carrying (Pearl Brewery apt + mortgage). 208 DOM. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash. Critical conversation needed.
deals.next: Broker call first. Then present three paths to Matt and Chandler. Get their decision on which path they have appetite for.

logs.m: Where Things Stand email sent to Matt and Chandler with full market analysis and three options.
Visited property. Arranged yard care. Awaiting showing agent feedback.
Buyer showing scheduled. Lawn care referral received.
Express Offers returned $550K - flag as context for sellers.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path - Jose Arango
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. Listed May 14 at $259,900. Referral from Isaac Linares. Motivated - must relocate to NC by second week of June. Hairline foundation crack flagged. Insurance adjuster roof claim moving forward.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Roof/fascia decision pending with insurance adjuster. Follow up with MK at Texas Hilltop Homes on showing feedback.

logs.m: MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing feedback received from MK.
Insurance adjuster was out May 11. Claim moving forward. MLS launch back on track.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live May 13.
Pre-inspection scheduled with Coach Ricky Smith at 8:30 AM.

deals.title: 00 Borregas - Elmendorf Land
deals.notes: Sisters wanted to end listing after March. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development (~$150K offer). Title defect identified in deed - attorney preparing correction deed. Josh LT potential partner for project.
deals.next: Pull sisters contact info. Confirm loan details and payoff. Discuss listing extension. Present Isaac development offer formally. Connect Isaac + Josh LT.

logs.m: Isaac development expanded to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer Ball contacted ENV Title and attorney Van Hutchins. Title defect confirmed - incomplete legal description.
Sisters updated on Apr 20 showing. Discussed Isaac development interest.
Dedicated showing occurred.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462 - Colton & Abigail Brown
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA 1,809 sqft on 4.05 acres. Payoff $255,578 (Feb 2026, ~$257K today). Thin market - 3 comps in 10 miles. Recommended list $295,000. Net proceeds scenarios $14.7K-$47.7K depending on list price.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage on-site. Confirm renovation status. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos. Discuss Colton's contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578. CMA pulled. Listing presentation with net sheet created.
Prior clients contacted. Going through divorce - need to sell after renovation.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss - Rental Listing
deals.notes: 1,535 sqft 3BR/2BA new construction (2025) Lennar home in Grace Gardens. Jimbo renting for 2 years then owner-occupying. Recommended rent $1,595/month. HOA $300/quarter. All listing questions answered May 14.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope and send for signatures. Order vinyl signs: Home for Rent + branded sign. Coordinate professional photos. Set up on Zillow, HAR, rental platforms.

logs.m: Jimbo replied with all listing answers. Rent $1,595, 12-month lease, full commission co-op, all terms confirmed.
Talked to Jimbo on the road to Devine. Son made flyers - need to review.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental property being sold. Landlord renovating and raising rents. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA requirement firm. Pre-approval target with Zach Schaphorst. Intro to new construction via rate buydown benefits.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Set up new construction home search platform. Identify builders with no HOA options.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com link for new construction browsing
Mike texted - rental selling. Introduced new construction idea. They were receptive.

leads.title: Kurt - 9815 Conbes
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Asked about nearby listing under contract at $275,000. Wants intel on offers and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurts area. Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes for offer details. Report back to Kurt. Determine if seller, buyer, or curious neighbor.

logs.m: Priority: Pull CMA and get everything together to list this property

leads.title: Bryce + Wife - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 (Priority Bank). Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info (phone/email). Qualify wifes VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Looking to buy in SA.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner - Buyer Fixer Property
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation. Caught up May 11 - details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and what property they want. Understand financing and work scope.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Details pending.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer - New Construction Buyer
leads.detail: Brandon Morans mom. Buying new construction. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Rate buydowns and builder incentives angle. Not locked to Grace Gardens or any one builder. Buyer rep signed May 7.
leads.next: Follow up with Milagros on timeline and interest level. Ask Brandon for status. Confirm MI Homes option reviewed. Set up new construction showings.

logs.m: Follow up needed - ask Brandon whats going on with timeline and interest level
MI Homes option from Frank found - keeps payments under $1,200/mo
Buyer rep signed

leads.title: Christina Shine - 13810 Tangle Tree St
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree she plans to sell soon. ~90% complete - trouble finishing. Working with current realtor (not available). Open to selling as-is. Opportunity for pre-market buyer or when realtor relationship changes.
leads.next: Follow up on how finishing work is going. Offer to promote to Chriss network/buyer list. If she stalls on finishing, revisit as-is conversation. Stay connected through garden community.

logs.m: Met at garden event. Plans to sell soon. Already working with realtor.

leads.title: Miss Pats Neighbor - Inherited Property
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed away. Son now owns the house. Previous owner was avid gardener. Son has not been contacted yet. Probate/inherited property opportunity.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - sons name and any contact info. Reach out to son as neighbor first, realtor second. Assess situation - keeping, renting, or selling.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned situation. Previous owner was avid gardener.

leads.title: Isaac Linares - Investor
leads.detail: Linares Capital LLC. Referral source for 10023 Mill Path listing (Jose Arango). Interested in Borregas development - mobile home project for veterans and profit. Partner Adam also involved. Exploring VA loan assumptions.
leads.next: Connect Isaac + Josh LT for Borregas mobile home project partnership. Follow up on Borregas project timeline and formal offer. Explore VA assumption opportunities for other deals.

logs.m: Development expanded to 10-acre lots. Josh LT potential partner.
Met at lunch. Discussed Borregas development opportunity.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Chris helped him get started in real estate. Connected to Green Bliss rental (8527 - uncle Jimbo owns). Mom (Milagros Stringer) is new construction buyer. Both represent commission opportunities through PM referrals and buyer deals.
leads.next: Confirm Wednesday or Thursday visit with Brandon and his mom to Grace Gardens. Register as buyer agent on first builder visit. Send PM company options with fee comparison. Confirm exact Green Bliss property address and rental price.

logs.m: James Jimbo Stringer (stepdad's brother) is rental contact. Called on the road to Devine.
Buyer rep sent to Milagros. Not yet signed.
Met in person at 8527 Green Bliss. Offered PM options.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share group. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential through trust-based relationship.
leads.next: Follow up - check in personally. Ask permission to share story (Healing Through Gardens - Sallie Maes Story). Keep nurturing - no rush on real estate.

logs.m: Community contact from Little Red House garden group
